name: submit_validation
description: Submit a quality assessment of a generated passage and its questions. Score each dimension from 0.0 (fails) to 1.0 (excellent). Always call this tool.

conceptCoverage.description: Does the passage actually teach every target concept it was asked to cover?

answerability.description: Is every question answerable from the passage alone, with no outside knowledge required?

keyCorrectness.description: Is every marked-correct answer actually correct, and every distractor actually incorrect?

distractorQuality.description: Are distractors plausible misconceptions a real student would fall for, not throwaway wrong answers?

lengthReadability.description: Is the passage within 220-260 words and at the right grade level / readability?

issues.description: Specific problems found, if any. Empty array if the content is clean.
